sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id Int32, quantity Float64);
SELECT id, formatReadableQuantity(quantity) AS readable_format FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity != ALL (SELECT quantity FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, formatReadableQuantity(quantity) AS readable_format FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity != ALL (SELECT DISTINCT quantity FROM test_numbers WHERE id > 2) AND id < 5;

SELECT id, formatReadableQuantity(SUM(quantity)) AS total_readable FROM (SELECT id, quantity FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id) GROUP BY id HAVING total_readable != ALL (SELECT formatReadableQuantity(quantity) FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity IS NOT NULL);

SELECT id, formatReadableQuantity(quantity) AS formatted_quantity FROM test_numbers WHERE formatted_quantity != ALL (SELECT formatReadableQuantity(quantity) FROM (SELECT quantity FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity IS NOT NULL));
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, quantity FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, formatReadableQuantity(quantity) AS human_readable FROM (SELECT id, quantity FROM temp_data WHERE quantity > 1000) WHERE quantity != ALL (SELECT quantity FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity IS NULL) ORDER BY id;

SELECT formatReadableQuantity(avg(quantity)) AS avg_readable FROM (SELECT quantity FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING count(*) > 1) WHERE avg_readable != ALL (SELECT formatReadableQuantity(quantity) FROM test_numbers WHERE quantity < 0);
CREATE TABLE boundary_test (num Int32, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT num, formatReadableQuantity(value) AS readable_value FROM boundary_test WHERE value != ALL (SELECT value FROM boundary_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND value != 0);
